reviews.review_description: My friend Mason made this game in unity and it's a tiny map and you can't Lucio run or pinch climb it has a working computer and servers work and it sends you to a random public only the Colliders are laggy and you have to type with ur wrist but it has a working mic and Mason made the monke design and finger animations. THE FACT MY FRIEND MADE IT IS INSANEEEEEEE

developer_response.body: Thanks bro! I really appreciate it -Meta Mason
